prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A pyramid with three horizontal layers, viewed from the front. Bottom layer (widest, gray): labeled "is object? not null?" with basic structural checks. Raw data enters from below; non-objects are rejected out the sides. Middle layer (medium, yellow): labeled "has required fields?" checking for specific property names. Objects missing fields are rejected. Top layer (narrow, green): labeled "correct types?" validating that each field has the right type. Only fully validated data reaches the golden peak, emerging as a typed object with a checkmark crown. Rejected items at each layer slide off the pyramid into a reject pile.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
